notes: Pulsar 95 | Multitasking foundation — background tasks while idle, experimental async shell
features: Background scheduled tasks fire while you're idle at the prompt (task background on)
Experimental asyncio shell — tasks fire even while you type (asyncmode on; crash-guarded, opt-in)
Standard synchronous shell stays the default and fallback
Help flags across all packages; httpd control-panel TUI; WebSearch package (search / wiki)
Built-in package sources now version-controlled; assorted polish + QC
